contextSummary: WordPress's next-generation editor. The new @wordpress/ui package builds its entire Popover family on Base UI, one file per part, with slot-overridable Portal/Positioner (for the iframed editor canvas), an optional Backdrop, dev-time validation that a Title is present, and a hook that deprioritizes Close buttons when resolving initial focus.

Dify's internal design system (packages/dify-ui) wraps Popover behind a single `placement` prop parsed into side/align, re-exports createHandle, and animates via data-starting/ending-style with motion-reduce support. Serves the flagship LLM app platform's UI.
PostHog's new 'quill' primitives package wraps Popover (Root/Trigger/Popup/Positioner/Portal plus Title/Description) as the base primitive for the product-analytics app's floating panels.
Mastra's playground-ui design system wraps Popover for the local agent-playground UI of the TypeScript AI-agent framework.
Wrapper in Electric's agents-server UI exposing modal (including 'trap-focus'), anchor, and initialFocus/finalFocus pass-throughs with CSS-module styling.
Typebot's shared packages/ui Popover wrapper used across the chatbot-builder product.
Reactive Resume's shared packages/ui popover wrapper (Title/Description included) used across the resume-builder app.

coss ui — the cal.com team's Base UI registry. Popover wrapper re-exports createHandle, wires the new Viewport part for smooth size transitions, offers a tooltipStyle variant, and passes through portalProps/anchor.
ReUI registry (listed on Base UI's community page): copy-paste Popover wrapper with Title/Description on the Base UI base.

Animate UI's Base primitives distribution: Popover integrated with motion/react — AnimatePresence-driven exit animations, a context bridging controlled open state, and a Portal that forces keepMounted so unmount animations can play.
Privacy-first analytics platform; packages/ui popover wrapper (Close/Title/Description) shared by dashboard apps.

GitHub-contributions poster generator (green-wall.leoku.dev). Ships a coss-lineage wrapper using the new Viewport part, createHandle re-export, and a tooltipStyle variant; popovers drive the appearance settings UI.
nan.fyi — Nanda Syahrasyad's interactive math/CS blog. Minimal popover wrapper: Trigger render-prop around arbitrary children, custom SVG Arrow, collisionPadding for the reading column.

Open agentic development environment. The prompt InputBar opens an MCP-server selector popover (side='top' align='end') portalled into a custom container element; TaskCreatePage hosts similar option popovers.

AI markdown editor (flashtype.com). The formatting toolbar's link editor is a Popover whose Trigger is composed into Toolbar.Button via render (nativeButton={false}), openOnHover disabled, and initialFocus pointed at the URL input — a form-in-popover inside a roving-tabindex toolbar.
Screenshot-beautifier web app. A settings rail opens controlled picker popovers (background gradient, pattern, frame, canvas size) to the right of each row (side='right' align='start').
AI 3D map editor. The toolbar's 'Generate Object' popover is a small AI-prompt form with Popover.Title and Popover.Close, glassmorphism styling, and streaming generation status.

The Graph's Hypergraph connect app. SpacesCard conditionally composes: in view mode the card is a Popover.Root with an info Popup (+Arrow) describing space visibility; in selection mode the same markup renders a Checkbox instead.

Unofficial Tailwind implementation of KRDS (Korea government design system). CoachMark renders sequential onboarding steps as an always-open Popover with a hidden zero-size Trigger whose getBoundingClientRect is overridden to a selector-resolved target; ContextualHelp is a second popover-based pattern.

Cross-platform Tauri music player (museeks.io). The header's play-queue popover anchors to a wrapper div via anchor={queueAnchorRef} (decoupled from the Trigger), composes the Trigger over a custom ButtonIcon via render, and styles with StyleX.

Personal AI assistant by egoist. @-mention file autocomplete: a triggerless controlled Popover anchored to the chat textarea (anchor={textareaRef}, side='top'), with initialFocus={false}/finalFocus={false} so typing never leaves the textarea; highlight/keyboard nav handled externally.

Public-sector data site by Métropole de Lyon's Erasme lab. Reusable FilterPopover: Trigger rendered as a ghost Button ('Filtres'), popup opens side='right' with injected filter-form content and an applied-state indicator on the trigger.

Russian-language production site (mtiyt.ru). DatePicker hosts react-day-picker inside a controlled Popover and commits the picked date/range on close (onOpenChange(false) → onPick), plus an explicit apply button.
App Store 'Today' archive browser (Korean). Calendar popover where every react-day-picker day renders as a Next.js Link navigating to /featured/<date> — the popover as a navigation surface.
Questionnaire designer by INSEE, the French national statistics institute. The next/ app's ui Popover wrapper includes Arrow, Title, and Description for survey-editing affordances.

Web3 governance tool. A generic Tooltip component is built from Popover.Root openOnHover delay={0} with an Arrow, rendering Markdown titles; trigger clicks are stopPropagation'd. Instructive: rich/interactive hover content on Popover vs the dedicated Tooltip component's non-interactive semantics.

LyteNyte Grid (commercial React data grid) docs demo: grid 'popover frames' render an always-open Popover per activated cell with anchor={params.target} (the clicked cell element), closed through the grid API — Base UI popover as the grid's cell-attached UI layer.
Small messaging side-project by a product designer; compact shadcn-style wrapper that also exports Positioner as PopoverAnchor.
Agent workplace platform (agh.network); packages/ui wrapper with Title/Description used across the console.
GUI for Claude Agent Skills by devxoul; ui wrapper including Arrow.
Popover usage found at registry/optics/popover.jsx (not deep-inspected; wrapper/usage inferred from path).
